summary: First frontend-only testing pass for FieldSnap Pro MVP. All listed flows verified in mobile web preview (375x667/390x844): Home renders title 'FieldSnap Pro' + Capture Photo + Gallery + Settings + empty Recent Observations. Settings shows all required controls (GPS toggle, templates A/B/C/D + custom-template-input visible after selecting D, Company/Project/Auditor fields, all 4 watermark toggles, theme-system/light/dark, settings-pin-toggle, reset-counter-button). Theme switching works. PIN setup navigates from settings-pin-toggle to /pin-setup, supports pin-input-1 → pin-input-2 → returns to settings. After enabling app lock, navigating to home redirects to /lock with lock-pin-input and lock-submit-button. Gallery /gallery shows gallery-grid, gallery-search-input, export-pdf-button and 'No observations yet' empty state. Camera /camera in web preview correctly shows grant-camera-permission-button (camera-view not exposed without granted permission — expected). Editor /editor without uri shows 'No image provided.' message. Observation /observation without id renders only back button & empty header (missing 'No observation found' empty-state message). App loads without runtime errors (only deprecation warnings).

ui_bugs.issue: When id is missing or invalid, the screen renders only header (back button) with empty number and no body content. Spec expected 'No observation found' empty state message to be shown.

issues: Blank screen below header — should display a clear empty/error state like 'No observation found'.

react_native_issues.issue: Console deprecation: 'textShadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'textShadow'. Reference: /app/frontend/app/editor.tsx:629-631 (textShadowColor/textShadowRadius/textShadowOffset)
Console deprecation: props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents. Reference: /app/frontend/app/editor.tsx (Svg pointerEvents='none', stamp/watermark/SafeAreaView pointerEvents)
Warning: useNativeDriver is not supported on web — Toast Animated falls back to JS animations. Acceptable for web preview but consider conditional useNativeDriver=Platform.OS!=='web' to silence.

action_items: Add 'No observation found' empty-state UI in /app/frontend/app/observation.tsx when getObservation returns null (current code renders nothing in that case).
Replace deprecated textShadowColor/textShadowRadius/textShadowOffset in editor.tsx watermarkText with new 'textShadow' style or wrap to avoid web deprecation warning.
Migrate props.pointerEvents='none' to style={{ pointerEvents: 'none' }} in editor.tsx Svg/stamp/watermark/SafeAreaView usages.
Optional: gate useNativeDriver behind Platform.OS !== 'web' in Toast/animations to remove warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Lock flow: on incorrect PIN, setPin('') clears state but Playwright-driven second attempt occasionally fails to unlock (likely controlled-TextInput sync in web preview, not a real bug — verifyPin hash compare is correct).
useFocusEffect on home re-loads observations on each focus — good. processGeocodeQueue is fire-and-forget with catch — good.
Editor: imageDims default 1080x1440 used when params missing; coordinates stored in container space (consistent for render but won't survive different aspect ratios on re-open — acceptable for MVP).
All screens use SafeAreaView from react-native-safe-area-context (correct), Text wrappers (correct), StyleSheet.create (correct), and EXPO env vars not needed since no backend.

No deprecated expo-av / expo-barcode-scanner / expo-background-fetch packages detected. Camera uses expo-camera (current). FileSystem uses 'expo-file-system/legacy' — works but legacy export will eventually be removed; consider migrating to current expo-file-system API.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (15/16 flows pass; observation invalid-id missing empty-state message)

seed_data_creation: None — app is local-storage only; cleared localStorage during testing to reset PIN/settings state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All listed testIDs are correctly implemented and reachable. Camera capture and full editor->observation save flow cannot be exercised in web preview (needs native expo-camera). To re-test PIN/lock flow, ensure localStorage is cleared first since AsyncStorage on web persists across sessions and may force /lock route. URL: https://field-docs-3.preview.emergentagent.com
rca_of_issue: Observation screen RCA: /app/frontend/app/observation.tsx lines 70-109 render <ScrollView> with `obs ? (...) : null` — when obs is null, nothing renders below header. Fix: add an `: ( <View><Text>No observation found</Text></View> )` branch.
